text: シーズナルイベント

“シーズナルイベント”は、
特定の期間に開催されるイベントです。

期間中は、マップやエネミーの見た目などが変化するほか、
過去の期間限定ラッピーが、ランダムで登場します。

イベントの案内役として、各アークス拠点に、
ラッピー大好きお兄さんのペッピーラッピーが登場します。

ペッピーラッピーからは“期間限定タスク”を受注したり、
“シーズナルポイント”をアイテムと交換できます。

シーズナルイベント期間中は、
イベント用の“デイリー/ウィークリータスク”が追加されます。

シーズナルイベントの詳細は、ペッピーラッピーにアクセスし、
“シーズナルイベントについて聞く”を選択することで
確認できます。

イベントの案内役として、各アークス拠点に、
アークス後方支援員のシトレーが登場します。

シトレーからは“期間限定タスク”を受注したり、
“シーズナルポイント”をアイテムと交換できます。

シーズナルイベント期間中は、
イベント用の“デイリー/ウィークリータスク”が追加されます。

シーズナルイベントの詳細は、シトレーにアクセスし、
“シーズナルイベントについて聞く”を選択することで
確認できます。

Seasonal Events

Seasonal Events are events held during specific periods.

During these periods, the appearance of the map and enemies may change, as well as Rappies from past events will appear randomly.

Rappy Loving Guy, Peppy Rappy will appear as an event guide at each ARKS base.

You can accept Limited-Time Tasks or exchange Seasonal Points with items from
Peppy Rappy.

During the Seasonal Event, additional Daily Tasks and Weekly Tasks for the event will
be active.

Access Peppy Rappy and select "Ask about Seasonal Events" for more details about the Seasonal Event.

ARKS Support Member Xitre can be found in every ARKS base to act as your event guide.

You can accept Limited-Time Tasks from Xitre and exchange Seasonal Points for items.

There are also special seasonal Daily and Weekly Tasks for you to try out during these Seasonal Event periods.

For more details on Seasonal Events, talk to Xitre and select "Ask about Seasonal Events".

Seasonal Events are events held during specific periods.

During these periods, the appearance of the map and enemies may change, and special seasonal Rappies will appear.

Seasonal Events are events held during specific periods.

During these events, the appearance of the map and enemies in the Aelio region may change, and special seasonal Rappies will appear.

ARKS Support Member Xitre can be found in every ARKS base to act as your event guide.

You can accept Limited-Time Tasks from Xitre and exchange Seasonal Points for items.

There are also special seasonal Daily and Weekly Tasks for you to try out during these Seasonal Event periods.

For more details on Seasonal Events, talk to Xitre and select "Ask about Seasonal Events".

Seasonal Events are events held during specific periods.

During these events, the appearance of the map and enemies in the Retem region may change, and special seasonal Rappies will appear.

ARKS Support Member Xiemi can be found in every ARKS base to act as your event guide.

You can accept Limited-Time Tasks from Xiemi and exchange Seasonal Points for items.

Furthermore, while Seasonal Events are underway, you can participate in additional event-themed Daily and Weekly Tasks.

You can learn more by talking to Xiemi and selecting "Ask about Seasonal Events".
